title: Spicy Tender Smoky Roasted Peanut Stir-fry
description: This low-carb-friendly Spicy Tender Smoky Roasted Peanut Stir-fry combines sous-vide cooking for tender peanuts with a quick stir-fry to create a delicious weeknight meal.
instructions: In a bowl, mix the peanuts with 1 tablespoon of oil and salt. Sous-vide for 4 hours.
When ready, remove the peanuts from the water bath and place them in a pan over medium heat. Toast until golden brown and fragrant, stirring occasionally to prevent burning.
Return the peanuts to their sous-vide container and add minced ginger, garlic, red chili flakes, and paprika. Stir well.
Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a wok or large skillet over high heat. Add the peanut mixture from the sous-vide step and stir-fry for about 3 minutes until heated through and fragrant.
Serve hot as a side dish or on top of rice.
